'''zavate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhegmatogenously|rhegmatogenously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhegmatogenously|rhegmatogenously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zavate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zavate|zavate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zavatesher|zavatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zavatesherĂ«m|zavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zavatero|zavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zavateshĂ«|zavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zavateshĂ«m|zavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizavatero|gokizavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizavateshĂ«|gokizavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizavateshĂ«m|gokizavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozavankerom|gozavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozavankeshĂ«|gozavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozavankeshĂ«m|gozavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozavankeya|gozavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zavaterom|zavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zavatemu|zavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zavateya|zavateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizavaterom|gokizavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizavatemu|gokizavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizavateya|gokizavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zavavate|zavavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zavavatesher|zavavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zavavatesherĂ«m|zavavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zavavatero|zavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zavavateshĂ«|zavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zavavateshĂ«m|zavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizavavatero|gokizavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizavavateshĂ«|gokizavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizavavateshĂ«m|gokizavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozavavankerom|gozavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozavavankeshĂ«|gozavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozavavankeshĂ«m|gozavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozavavankeya|gozavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zavavaterom|zavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zavavatemu|zavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zavavateya|zavavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizavavaterom|gokizavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizavavatemu|gokizavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizavavateya|gokizavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠvĂŠte|zĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠvĂŠtesher|zĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠvĂŠtero|zĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠvĂŠtero|gokizĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠvĂŠterom|zĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠvĂŠtemu|zĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠvĂŠteya|zĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠvĂŠterom|gokizĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠvĂŠteya|gokizĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafvafte|zafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafvaftesher|zafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafvaftesherĂ«m|zafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafvaftero|zafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafvafteshĂ«|zafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafvafteshĂ«m|zafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafvaftero|gokizafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafvafteshĂ«|gokizafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafvafteshĂ«m|gokizafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafvafnkerom|gozafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafvafnkeshĂ«|gozafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafvafnkeshĂ«m|gozafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafvafnkeya|gozafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafvafterom|zafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafvaftemu|zafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafvafteya|zafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafvafterom|gokizafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafvaftemu|gokizafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafvafteya|gokizafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
